texto: It's toys, boy, all toys. You'll see more and more contraptions as you get older, but if I teach you anything, you'll learn that all of this is decoration. What counts is what's inside you and what you can see in others.
explicacao: Citação de Stefan Petrucha sobre temas ligados a educacao. “It's toys, boy, all toys. You'll see more and more contraptions as you get older, but if I teach …” articula educacao, identity, reflexao em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: It's toys, boy, all toys. You'll see more and more contraptions as you get older, but if I teach you anything, you'll learn that all of this is decoration. What counts is what's inside you and what you can see in others.

texto: Your novels show only the tiniest fraction of detective work, the brilliant crime, the tantalizing clues, the dramatic chase, the final battle atop a lofty peak with ocean waves crashing down below, and then… justice served! If they wrote about the real world, four-fifths of the story would consist of the hero sitting in a library for months and following false leads.
explicacao: Citação de Stefan Petrucha sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Your novels show only the tiniest fraction of detective work, the brilliant crime, the tantalizin…” articula humor, mystery, novels em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e mystery.
